parsed.generic_mechanism: The largest difference is compression: one chapter repeatedly re-explains its governing distinction through a fixed validate-question-defer pattern, while the other turns successive concrete examples into fresh argumentative pressure.

paraphrased_evidence.A: A coherent central metaphor and careful qualifications organize the argument, but the serial examples keep validating experiences, deferring explanations, and returning to the same distinction; the instruction and extended recap then restate an already settled point.
paraphrased_evidence.B: Concrete scenes of private binges, inherited meal habits, holiday excess, and dieting give the chapter texture; despite promotional certainty and some strained analogies, it moves briskly from shame through conditioning toward a promised reframing.
